style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="Application" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="240" x="600" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Plain Ethernet Frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="300" x="570" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-dst" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D9EAF7;strokeColor=#4A86A8;fontStyle=1;" value="DST MAC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="260" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-src" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D9EAF7;strokeColor=#4A86A8;fontStyle=1;" value="SRC MAC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="410" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-type" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EEF2;strokeColor=#607D8B;fontStyle=1;" value="EtherType" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="560" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-payload" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontStyle=1;" value="Plain Payload" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="350" x="690" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-crc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#777777;fontStyle=1;" value="CRC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="1040" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="upper-flow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=14;" value="TX / RX Ethernet frames" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="220" x="610" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stack" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=14;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=20;" value="<b>Lightweight MACsec Stack</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="340" width="1120" x="160" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="macsec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1F8E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=15;" value="<b>MACsec</b><br/>IEEE 802.1AE<br/><br/>Frame encryption<br/>Authentication<br/>Replay protection<br/>Packet number" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="360" x="230" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="macsec-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#81C784;dashed=1;fontSize=13;" value="Payload is encrypted.<br/>Source and destination MAC addresses remain visible." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="220" x="610" y="405" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mka" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=15;" value="<b>MKA</b><br/>IEEE 802.1X<br/><br/>Peer discovery<br/>Key agreement<br/>Key Server election<br/>SAK distribution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="360" x="850" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sak-label" connectable="0" parent="1" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="SAK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="60" x="690" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sak-edge" edge="1" parent="1" source="mka" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="macsec"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="driver" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=17;" value="<b>Ethernet Driver</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="720" x="360" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lower-flow" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=14;" value="TX / RX Ethernet frames" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="220" x="610" y="675" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="protected-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Protected Ethernet Frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="300" x="570" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-dst" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D9EAF7;strokeColor=#4A86A8;fontStyle=1;" value="DST MAC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="190" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-src" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D9EAF7;strokeColor=#4A86A8;fontStyle=1;" value="SRC MAC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="330" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-type" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EEF2;strokeColor=#607D8B;fontStyle=1;" value="MACsec<br/>EtherType" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="470" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-sectag" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontStyle=1;" value="SecTAG" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="600" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-data" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontStyle=1;" value="Ciphertext" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="270" x="730" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-icv" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontStyle=1;" value="ICV" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="1000" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prot-crc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#777777;fontStyle=1;" value="CRC" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="1120" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ethernet-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="Ethernet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="240" x="600" y="825" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="top-edge" edge="1" parent="1" source="plain-payload" style="startArrow=block;startFill=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="stack"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stack-driver-edge" edge="1" parent="1" source="stack" style="startArrow=block;startFill=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="driver"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="driver-frame-edge" edge="1" parent="1" style="startArrow=block;startFill=1;endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="820.0040350877194" y="660" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="901.4075438596493" y="740" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
